meaning: 法戈[美国北达科他州东南部城市]
examples: Some big banks, like Wells Fargo, are now offering to convert your magstripe card to a chip-and-PIN model.
Companies from Google to L'Oréal to IBM to Wells Fargo are known to use some degree of gamification in their workplaces.
I had a whale of a time in Fargo.
He and his friends from nearby Fargo filled in that night, and his career began.
Elsewhere in the financial sector Wells Fargo slipped 0.5% despite an increase in fourth-quarter profit.
